# Architecture — Everything Claude Code

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|

| Test files | 27 (1,238 assertions) |
| Runtime deps | 1 (`omelette`) |
| Node.js | >=18 |

### Hooks (`src/hooks/` — 23 implementations, 1,551 LOC)

Script-only (no exports). Invoked by `hooks.json` event mapping via `run-with-flags.ts`.

### CI Validators (`src/ci/` — 6 validators, 519 LOC)

Script-only (no exports). Validate agents, commands, skills, rules, hooks structure.

### Root Scripts (`src/` — 6 files, 1,245 LOC)

| Script | LOC | Purpose |
|--------|-----|---------|
| claw.ts | 393 | NanoClaw persistent REPL |
| install-orchestrator.ts | 300 | Node.js install pipeline |
| setup-package-manager.ts | 197 | Package manager setup |
| skill-create-output.ts | 235 | Skill creation output |
| postinstall.ts | 82 | npm postinstall health checks |
| preuninstall.ts | 38 | npm preuninstall cleanup |

## System Diagram

```
User CLI (ecc)
  │
  ├─ bin/ecc.js ─── shell completion (omelette)
  │    └─ install.sh (bash orchestrator)
  │         ├─ cmd_install → install-orchestrator.ts
  │         │    ├─ detect     → scan ~/.claude/
  │         │    ├─ manifest   → track artifacts
  │         │    ├─ merge      → interactive diff review
  │         │    ├─ smart-merge → LCS diff + Claude AI merge
  │         │    └─ gitignore  → manage .gitignore
  │         └─ cmd_init → project CLAUDE.md + hooks
  │
  ├─ hooks.json → 23 hook implementations
  │    └─ run-with-flags.ts (profile gating)
  │
  └─ Content (copied to ~/.claude/)
       ├─ agents/    (24)
       ├─ commands/  (46)
       ├─ skills/    (69)
       ├─ rules/     (34 across 6 groups)
       └─ contexts/  (3)
```

## Build Pipeline

```
src/**/*.ts → tsc → dist/**/*.js (CommonJS) → npm publish → npm install -g → postinstall.ts
```

## Test Architecture

```
tests/harness.js    → shared test()/describe() with auto-async detection
tests/run-all.js    → single-process runner (require, env snapshot/restore)
tests/**/*.test.js  → 27 files, each exports runTests()
```
